title: Identity comparisons should not be used with cached types
description: Avoid using identity operators (==, !=) with cached types, such as frozenset, because they will always return False.
message: Avoid identity comparison with cached types like frozenset
impact: Performance may be impacted due to unnecessary cache lookups
recommendation: Use equality checks with cached types using the 'is' keyword instead

noncompliant.code: a = frozenset([1, 2, 3]); if a == frozenset([1, 2, 3]): pass

compliant.code: a = frozenset([1, 2, 3]); if a is frozenset([1, 2, 3]): pass

why_is_this_an_issue: Identity operators compare object identity, not content, so they fail to return true for cached objects like frozenset.
how_to_fix: Use 'is' keyword for equality checks with cached objects

metadata.title: Identity comparisons should not be used with cached types
